evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Uses current Instagram Login endpoints (www.instagram.com/oauth/authorize, graph.instagram.com, scopes instagram_business_basic and instagram_business_content_publish). API version v24.0 consistent. No deprecated Basic Display traps detected. Internally consistent and explicitly avoids deprecated API.
evidence.executability: pip commands shown as separate lines (not requirements.txt despite reference). Frontend uses 'npm install axios==1.6.2' which is invalid npm syntax (should be @1.6.2). react-router-dom is used but never installed. Backend OAuth callback handler is POST while Instagram will redirect GET to /auth/callback — frontend route catches it but backend route /auth/callback is POST-only, which is fine since frontend handles the redirect. Multiple non-obvious fixes needed.
evidence.completeness: All six pieces present: (a) credential acquisition with URL/menu, (b) install commands (with npm syntax error), (c) .env template with exact names, (d) backend code, (e) frontend code, (f) test command/tests. Env vars referenced match those listed. Test file is cut off at end.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Only inline [1] markers with no actual URL references listed. No canonical developers.facebook.com/docs/instagram-platform URL placed near code. Reference list appears truncated/missing.

rubric_notes: Playbook appears truncated mid-test-file. npm install with == version syntax is invalid (npm uses @). react-router-dom dependency missing from install list.
